UnusedPrivateProperty:SystemSoundPlayer.kt$SystemSoundPlayer$val player = MediaPlayer().apply { setDataSource(context, uri) setAudioAttributes( AudioAttributes.Builder() .setUsage(usage) .setContentType(AudioAttributes.CONTENT_TYPE_SONIFICATION) .build() ) val normalized = safeVolume / 100f setVolume(normalized, normalized) setOnPreparedListener { it.start() } setOnCompletionListener { it.release() } prepareAsync() }
